basic_details.job_title: Bellary DCC Bank Recruitment 2026 – Apply Online for 82 Junior Assistant, Driver and More Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Ballari District Co-operative Central Bank Ltd. (Bellary DCC Bank), Hosapete
basic_details.post_name: Manager / First Division Assistant; Second Division Assistant; Vehicle Driver; Junior Servant
basic_details.short_information: Bellary DCC Bank, Hosapete is recruiting 82 posts across 4 categories, last date 30 June 2026.

important_dates.exam_date: To be notified via SMS/Email/Bank Website
important_dates.interview_date: To be notified after Written Examination result

age_limit.details: Candidates must be a minimum of 18 years of age as on the last date of application. The following maximum age limits apply: | Age Relaxation (Over and above the above limits): | Ex-Servicemen: Age equivalent to the period of military service rendered (as per Government norms). Differently-Abled (Physically Challenged) Candidates: 10 years additional relaxation. Widowed Women: 10 years additional (candidate must upload a certificate from the Tahsildar confirming widowhood and non-remarriage). | Special Note: As per Government Notification No. ಸಿ.ಆ.ಸು.ಇ:2062:ಸೇನೆನಿ 2025, Bengaluru dated 29.01.2026, all category candidates who were participating in the selection process based on the age schedule as on the notified maximum age limit are to be provided 5 years of one-time age relaxation (As a One Time Measure) for participating in recruitment processes. Candidates who applied under the previous notification dated 06.04.2026 and were within the age limit are considered eligible for the current notification's age limit as on 30.06.2026. | Important Fee Rules: | Application and fee payment start date: 01-06-2026 Last date for application and fee payment: 30-06-2026 Payment mode: Online only - Net Banking, Credit Card, Debit Card, UPI, or Google Pay; DD/Postal Order/Money Order/any other mode is NOT accepted. Fee once paid will NOT be refunded under any circumstances. Each post requires a separate application and separate fee payment.

vacancy_details.Educational Qualification: 1. Must have passed a degree from any University established by law in India. 2. Must have the ability to read Kannada along with knowledge of Kannada language, writing, clear spoken Kannada, and ability to understand Kannada. 3. Must have knowledge of computer operation.

1. Must have passed Second PUC or equivalent from a recognized institution, or currently studying. 2. Must have the ability to read Kannada along with knowledge of Kannada language, writing, clear spoken Kannada, and ability to understand Kannada. 3. Must have knowledge of computer operation.
1. Must have passed SSLC; must be able to read Kannada as one language. 2. Must hold a valid legal driving license.
1. Must have passed SSLC; must be able to read Kannada as one language.

how_to_apply: Candidates must apply Online only through the Bank's official website. No other mode of application will be accepted. Before filling the application, candidates must mandatorily read the notification and instructions carefully.

Step 1: Visit the Bank's official website https://www.bellarydcc.bank.in and open the link "BDCC RECRUITMENT 2026" on a desktop/laptop computer. Read the notification and instructions carefully before filling the application.

After clicking the registration box, a confirmation check box will appear for candidates who have previously applied and paid the fee. Those candidates must re-submit the application with the same registration number clearly mentioned, upload documents, and re-submit.
important_instructions: Candidates who had applied and paid the fee under Bank Recruitment Notification No. 12:2026–27 dated 06.04.2026 and who wish to apply for the same posts in the current notification must mandatorily re-apply online. They must clearly mention the previous registration number and re-upload all required documents. No separate fee payment is required for those posts. Candidates who had applied and downloaded the application under the 06.04.2026 notification must register freshly with a new registration number, re-submit, and upload documents as per current requirements. Once Application Re-submit is done, it cannot be re-edited and fees paid will not be refunded. Each post still requires a separate application; one Application Re-submit per post is allowed. Information regarding re-application will be communicated via SMS and email to the registered mobile number and email ID of candidates who had previously applied and downloaded their application under the earlier notification.

SC (Category A, B, C) / ST / Pangada candidates: Upload certificate in Form-D Category-1 candidates: Upload certificate in Form-E Category-2A, 2B, 3A, 3B candidates: Upload certificate in Form-F, obtained from the concerned Tahsildar; these certificates for Backward Hindu categories must be valid within 5 years from the date of application.
